description: Canonical machine-readable prompt list for Know-Thyself v0.1. The MVP app (ARCHITECTURE.md) loads this file at build/runtime and serves day[i] on day i since launch. Source-of-truth for both prompt text and day-1-to-30 sequence. Markdown counterparts (prompts-hebrew-seed-bank-v1.md, sequence-30-day.md) are human-readable views of the same data. Every prompt carries text_he (the live, user-facing Hebrew) plus text_en (an English gloss for review and tooling; NOT shown to users).
design_rules: Day 1 is light and welcoming. No fear or shame on the first day.
Days 1 to 15 avoid Fear-tagged prompts. Trust first.
Days 23 to 30 are the intentional descent. Fear and identity-edge prompts cluster here, on purpose.
Anchor days (7, 14, 21, 28) pair with the weekly reflection.
Day 30 is forward-facing, pointing into month 2 rather than just looking back.
Every prompt is gender-neutral Hebrew: no gendered pronouns or verb forms.
Every prompt should be answerable in 2 to 3 minutes.

prompts.text_he: מתי הכי נוח לך בתוך עצמך?
prompts.text_en: When are you most at ease inside yourself?
prompts.note: Day 1: soft, inviting, no shame.

prompts.text_he: מה נהיה קל יותר בשבילך לאחרונה?
prompts.text_en: What has become easier for you lately?
prompts.note: Positive momentum on day 2.

prompts.text_he: מה נעשה אצלך לאחרונה על אוטומט?
prompts.text_en: What have you been doing on autopilot lately?
prompts.note: Builds noticing muscle early: surface one automatic pattern without judgment.

prompts.text_he: איזה חלק ביום שלך מרגיש הכי אמיתי?
prompts.text_en: Which part of your day feels the most real?
prompts.note: Positive identity prompt: locate authenticity before the week deepens.

prompts.text_he: איזה צורך שלך קיבל הכי מעט מקום השבוע?
prompts.text_en: Which of your needs got the least room this week?
prompts.note: Opens emotion register gently.

prompts.text_he: מה באמת חשוב לך יותר ממה שנראה כלפי חוץ?
prompts.text_en: What really matters to you more than how it looks from the outside?
prompts.note: First values prompt, anchor before weekly.

prompts.text_he: איזה דפוס חוזר אצלך?
prompts.text_en: Which pattern keeps repeating in you?
prompts.note: Anchor day. Pairs with the first weekly reflection.

prompts.text_he: מה הפתיע אותך בעצמך החודש?
prompts.text_en: What surprised you about yourself this month?
prompts.note: Day after the first anchor: reflect outward across the past month, still light.

prompts.text_he: מה ממשיך להיסחב רק מתוך הרגל?
prompts.text_en: What keeps dragging on only out of habit?
prompts.note: Names inertia without blame. Sets up the heavier day-10 prompt.

prompts.text_he: מתי הרגשת קנאה, ועל מה היא הצביעה?
prompts.text_en: When did you feel jealousy, and what did it point to?
prompts.note: First heavier prompt: jealousy as signal.

prompts.text_he: לאן הולכת לך אנרגיה על דברים פחות חשובים?
prompts.text_en: Where is your energy going on things that matter less?
prompts.note: Values check after the day-10 jealousy prompt: where attention is leaking.

prompts.text_he: איזה הרגל עוזר לך, ואיזה רק מרגיע אותך?
prompts.text_en: Which habit helps you, and which only soothes you?
prompts.note: Help-vs-comfort distinction.

prompts.text_he: איזה רגע היום ביקש ממך לעצור, ולא עצרת?
prompts.text_en: Which moment today asked you to pause, and you didn't?
prompts.note: Same-day micro-noticing. Lower lift than week-scale prompts, builds presence.

prompts.text_he: מה נותן לך תחושת משמעות גם בלי הכרה?
prompts.text_en: What gives you a sense of meaning even without recognition?
prompts.note: Anchor day. Meaning without recognition.

prompts.text_he: איזה רגע קטן מהשבוע לא יוצא לך מהראש?
prompts.text_en: Which small moment from this week keeps coming back to you?
prompts.note: Last Fear-free day. Soft emotional surfacing before the deeper second half.

prompts.text_he: על מה נאמר "אין לי זמן" כשבעצם אין רצון?
prompts.text_en: About what do you say "I have no time" when really it's that you don't want to?
prompts.note: First mid-month confrontation prompt: a small honest distinction, still pre-Fear.

prompts.text_he: איפה יש נטייה להתקטן כדי שיהיה פשוט יותר?
prompts.text_en: Where is there a tendency to make yourself smaller just to keep things simple?
prompts.note: Names a self-shrinking pattern without using Fear tag yet.

prompts.text_he: מה קשה לך לתת לעצמך, אבל קל לבקש מאחרים?
prompts.text_en: What is hard for you to give yourself, yet easy to ask of others?
prompts.note: Evergreen self-vs-other asymmetry. Lands well in week 3.

prompts.text_he: מה ביקשת מעצמך השבוע שהיה לא הוגן?
prompts.text_en: What did you ask of yourself this week that was unfair?
prompts.note: Self-compassion angle, recasting harshness toward self as something to notice.

prompts.text_he: מה כבר לא מתאים לך עכשיו?
prompts.text_en: What no longer fits you now?
prompts.note: Preps for end-of-month.

prompts.text_he: מה ידוע לך על עצמך היום שלא היה ידוע לפני שנה?
prompts.text_en: What do you know about yourself today that you didn't a year ago?
prompts.note: Anchor day. Year-over-year identity.

prompts.text_he: איזו אמת נאמרת לאחרים, וקשה לך לחיות אותה?
prompts.text_en: Which truth do you tell others, but find hard to live yourself?
prompts.note: Last day before the descent. Names a private gap between speech and life.

prompts.text_he: מה ממשיך להידחות מסיבה שכבר לא רלוונטית?
prompts.text_en: What keeps getting postponed for a reason that no longer applies?
prompts.note: Start of the intentional descent. First Fear-tagged prompt.

prompts.text_he: איזה אישור עדיין מבוקש, גם כשהוא לא נחוץ?
prompts.text_en: Whose approval do you still seek, even when you don't need it?
prompts.note: Descent week: surfaces a residual approval-seeking pattern.

prompts.text_he: איזה מחיר שקט משולם על משהו שנראה "בסדר"?
prompts.text_en: What quiet price are you paying for something that looks "fine"?
prompts.note: Names hidden cost of accepted compromises. Sits between two heavier prompts.

prompts.text_he: מה מפחיד אותך לאבד, ומה זה אומר עליך?
prompts.text_en: What are you afraid to lose, and what does that say about you?
prompts.note: Heaviest evergreen, well-spaced.

prompts.text_he: מה נשאר אצלך בפנים, אבל לא יוצא החוצה?
prompts.text_en: What stays inside you, but doesn't come out?
prompts.note: Late-descent prompt: what stays internal, without forcing it out.

prompts.text_he: מה חשוב לך לשמור בשליטה עכשיו?
prompts.text_en: What do you want to keep under control right now?
prompts.note: Anchor day. Only anchor day with a heavier prompt, intentional as the user enters the closing week.

prompts.text_he: מה נשאר מוסתר גם מעצמך?
prompts.text_en: What remains hidden even from yourself?
prompts.note: Closing depth.

prompts.text_he: מה כבר ברור לך, אבל עוד לא נאמר בקול?
prompts.text_en: What is already clear to you, but hasn't been said out loud yet?
prompts.note: Forward-facing into month 2.
